'''Bobringi Mafusa''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] who celebrated his [[Life Day/Legends|Life Day]] aboard the luxury star-cruiser ''[[Star of Empire]]''. He was served special Mon Calamari [[crab-stuffed creampuff]]s. Over his table was hung a banner reading ''"Happy Life Day, Bobringi Mafusa. You're one fine Mon Calamari"''. After Bobringi and his friends exited the ''Star of the Empire'' during an evacuation, [[Zak Arranda/Legends|Zak Arranda]] located their abandoned party table and attempted to eat one of the creampuffs—much to his later regret, as the creampuffs were filled with live crabs.

==Appearances==
*''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Doomsday Ship]]'' {{1stm}}
